source_pr.title: *: support the vector index
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/55693

Problem Summary:
Merge https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/tree/feature/vector-index to the master branch.
* support vector index at the parser, https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/55698
* executor: Provide TIFLASH_INDEXES table, https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/55901
* support for adding/dropping vector index, https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/55839
* support create table with vector indexes and others, https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/56124 

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Support the vector index
```

symptoms: jobs, err := getJobsBySQL(tk.Session(), "tidb_ddl_history", "order by job_id desc limit 1") (pkg/ddl/index_modify_test.go)
failure_signature: jobs, err := getJobsBySQL(tk.Session(), "tidb_ddl_history", "order by job_id desc limit 1") (pkg/ddl/index_modify_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to confidently classify this as a flaky-test stabilization from the available case data. This PR is a large feature merge to support vector indexes (parser/DDL/executor/infoschema), and the referenced snippet is part of new/updated DDL tests; treat as a low-confidence/unclear flaky-fix signal.

evidence: evidence: jobs, err := getJobsBySQL(tk.Session(), "tidb_ddl_history", "order by job_id desc limit 1") (pkg/ddl/index_modify_test.go)
